full_name_hint: This is how other users will see your name
default_location_hint: Used to auto-fill location when requesting rides
notif_inactive: Enable notifications to be notified in real time.
notif_denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in site settings.
notif_blocked_alert:
Notifications are blocked by the browser.
Go to site settings (🔒 icon in address bar) to allow them.
share_invite_hint: Share this link or code with friends. When they sign up or enter your code, they'll become your subscribers and see your parties.
add_friend_hint: Enter a friend's invite code to subscribe to their parties.
no_subscribers: No subscribers yet. Share your invite link to get started!
no_subscribed: Not subscribed to anyone yet. Use an invite link to connect!
remove_subscriber_hint: This person will no longer see your parties.
unsubscribe_hint: You will no longer see this person's parties.
invalid_code: Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.
already_subscribed: You are already subscribed to this user!
add_failed: Failed to add friend. Please try again.
profile_update_failed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
qr_subtitle: Scan to add me as a friend
